'''Tetan Assault Ships''' were military troop carrier vessels used by the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]].<ref name="TOTJ:DLOTS" />

==Characteristics==
[[File:Krathcoup.jpg|thumb|left|100px|Assault ships touch down on [[Empress Teta/Legends|Koros Major]].]]

The Tetan assault ships were described as being flying decks, and were used to transport soldiers and armored vehicles to [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] surfaces. This cargo was unleashed onto battlefields once the ship touched down.<ref name="TOTJ:DLOTS" /> The distinctive silhuettes of these ships filling the skies became one of the most enduring symbols of the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].

==History==
A fleet of these vessels were launched from the [[Krath command station|Tetan command station]] and were used by the Krath to subjugate the six worlds of the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]] including [[Empress Teta/Legends|Empress Teta]]. Hundreds of ships clouded the skies above Koros Major cities and touched down on the outskirts, sending troops and tanks to conquer them.<ref name="TOTJ:DLOTS" />
